evaluation_method: 5 LLM Judges + Minority Override + G4 Originality Detection
campaign: MarbMarket - The First veDEX on MegaETH is Launching
mission: Explain the veDEX Model & Why MarbMarket Matters
best_content:
Been thinking about how most DEXs just throw rewards at liquidity and hope for the best. Then I saw MarbMarket's approach. It flips the script by letting token holders actually decide where value flows. That's huge.

First veDEX on MegaETH. No presale. No VCs. Just pure community governance. Lock MARB, get voting power, direct emissions to the pools you want. Projects can even bribe for votes. transparently.

The incentive loop is brilliant. MARB lockers direct emissions. LPs earn rewards. Protocols pay bribes. Value flows back to lockers. It's not just farming. It's building a system that compounds over time.

MarbMarket is quietly changing how we think about DeFi governance. Power to the people who actually care, not just wallets dumping bags.

Check them out: x.com/Marb_market

What other ve(3,3) models have you seen that actually work? @RallyOnChain
qa_comments: The bribe mechanism adds a whole new layer to the game. Definitely need to check this out.
Love seeing governance models that actually reward long-term holders instead of just chasers.
This is exactly what the space needs. Building real value instead of just vaporware.
